name: property managers handling 10-20 rental units/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10-20 rental units/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate rent reconciliation reports instead of manual spreadsheets and calculations.
problem_solved: Manual reconciliation of rent payments leads to errors and delays.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual reconciliation of rent payments leads to errors and delays.
